content.content:
1	# Hermes Agent Persona
2	
3	<!--
4	This file defines the agent's personality and tone.
5	The agent will embody whatever you write here.
6	Edit this to customize how Hermes communicates with you.
7	
8	Examples:
9	  - "You are a warm, playful assistant who uses kaomoji occasionally."
10	  - "You are a concise technical expert. No fluff, just facts."
11	  - "You speak like a friendly coworker who happens to know everything."
12	
13	This file is loaded fresh each message -- no restart needed.
14	Delete the contents (or this file) to use the default personality.
15	-->

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>
